headline.purpose: One fixed-size title per product screen.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus and compact state feedback only.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single dominant action within a local decision point.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { background:#704a8f; border:1px solid #704a8f; border-radius:6px; color:#fff; font:600 12.5px Inter,ui-sans-serif,sans-serif; height:40px; padding:0 15px; } .ds-button-primary:hover { background:#5f3d7b; border-color:#5f3d7b; } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #8a63a7; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: A quiet white field with an explicit focus treatment.
components.css: .ds-input { background:#fff; border:1px solid rgba(42,32,51,.22); border-radius:6px; color:#453b4a; font:400 12px Inter,ui-sans-serif,sans-serif; height:40px; padding:0 12px; width:280px; } .ds-input:focus { border-color:#704a8f; outline:2px solid rgba(112,74,143,.16); outline-offset:1px; }

components.name: Active Navigation Item
components.description: A solid light selection inside the aubergine rail.
components.css: .ds-nav-active { align-items:center; background:#fff; border-radius:6px; color:#33223f; display:flex; font:600 13px Inter,ui-sans-serif,sans-serif; min-height:42px; padding:0 12px; text-decoration:none; width:180px; } .ds-nav-active:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #cfb4e5; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Status Label
components.description: Written state reinforced by semantic color.
components.css: .ds-status { background:#edf4ee; border:1px solid #cbdccc; border-radius:4px; color:#3f704a; display:inline-flex; font:600 10.5px Inter,ui-sans-serif,sans-serif; line-height:24px; padding:0 9px; }

components.name: Operational Panel
components.description: A flat evidence container separated by a quiet divider.
components.css: .ds-panel { background:#fff; border:1px solid rgba(42,32,51,.12); border-radius:8px; color:#201824; font:400 14px Inter,ui-sans-serif,sans-serif; padding:20px; width:280px; } .ds-panel strong { display:block; font-weight:650; } .ds-panel p { color:#665d6c; font-size:12px; margin:4px 0 0; }

narrative.overview: ChangeLens is a dependable working instrument: calm enough to scan for hours, exact enough to trust when something fails, and distinctive without inventing unfamiliar controls.
keyCharacteristics: Dense but readable at normal zoom
Restrained plum identity with semantic state colors

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Plum occupies less than ten percent of the work area and always communicates action, focus or selection.

rules.name: The Readable Density Rule
rules.body: Dense does not mean tiny; persistent interface text stays at 11px or larger.

rules.name: The Border-or-Shadow Rule
rules.body: A component may use a quiet border or a compact shadow, never both as decoration.

dos: Use the aubergine rail as the identity anchor and keep the work canvas light.
Reserve plum for primary actions, focus and current selection.
Use tables, dividers and spatial grouping before introducing another card.
donts: Don't use purple gradients, glow, glassmorphism or decorative background grids.
Don't repeat tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows.
Don't use colored side stripes on cards, rows, alerts or selected fields.
